query:
-- Continuity type breakdown
SELECT continuity_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM requests
WHERE request_type = 'vacation' AND status = 'pending'
GROUP BY continuity_type;

-- Employees with multiple vacation requests
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS employees_with_multiple_requests
FROM (
  SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS req_count
  FROM requests
  WHERE request_type = 'vacation'
  GROUP BY employee_id
  HAVING req_count > 1
) t;

-- Average requests per employee
SELECT 
  ROUND(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id), 2) AS avg_requests_per_employee
FROM requests
WHERE request_type = 'vacation';

-- Employees who only have P1 requests
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) AS employees_only_p1
FROM requests
WHERE request_type = 'vacation' AND status = 'pending'
  AND employee_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT employee_id FROM requests
    WHERE request_type = 'vacation' AND status = 'pending' AND priority > 1
  );
